description: Schema for daily BTC risk-neutral moment signals computed via static replication
method: Bakshi, Kapadia & Madan (2003) static replication with trapezoidal integration

columns.name: snapshot_ts
columns.description: Timestamp of the underlying surface snapshot

columns.name: forward_price
columns.description: Synthetic forward price for this expiry in USD

columns.name: index_price
columns.description: BTC spot index price in USD at snapshot time

columns.name: n_strikes
columns.description: Total number of strikes with matched call/put pairs

columns.name: n_otm_strikes
columns.description: Number of OTM strikes used in integration

columns.name: mu2_variance
columns.description: Annualised risk-neutral variance (n=2 moment contract); SVIX^2

columns.name: mu3_cubic
columns.description: Annualised cubic contract (n=3 moment); skewness contribution

columns.name: mu4_quartic
columns.description: Annualised quartic contract (n=4 moment); kurtosis contribution

columns.name: svix
columns.description: SVIX index = sqrt(mu2_variance); annualised volatility units
